# Architecture — rhino-os v3.0

## System Overview

rhino-os is a filesystem-based orchestration system. No database, no server, no MCP. All state is JSON/TSV/Markdown files read and written by Claude Code sessions via hooks and skills.

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Claude Code Session                                     │
│  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────┐              │
│  │ Skills   │  │ Programs │  │ Hooks    │              │
│  │ (/build) │→ │ (build.md│→ │ (quality,│              │
│  │          │  │  strategy)│  │  context)│              │
│  └────┬─────┘  └────┬─────┘  └────┬─────┘              │
│       │              │              │                    │
│       ▼              ▼              ▼                    │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │ Filesystem State Layer                          │    │
│  │  ~/.claude/state/     (brains, workspace, sweep)│    │
│  │  ~/.claude/knowledge/ (learnings, predictions)  │    │
│  │  ~/.claude/logs/      (usage, cost, patterns)   │    │
│  │  .claude/             (plans, scores, evals)    │    │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│       │              │                                   │
│       ▼              ▼                                   │
│  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────┐                             │
│  │ score.sh │  │ taste.mjs│                             │
│  │ (grep)   │  │ (vision) │                             │
│  └──────────┘  └──────────┘                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## State Model

All state lives in two locations:

### Global State (`~/.claude/`)

| Path | Format | Purpose | Written By | Read By |
|------|--------|---------|-----------|---------|
| `state/workspace.json` | JSON | Multi-project registry, focus, autonomy | /setup, strategist | All sessions (via hooks) |
| `state/brains/{agent}.json` | JSON | Agent memory, next_move, bias | Each agent | /council, session_context |
| `state/.session-autonomy` | Plain text | 2h autonomy override | User/agent | autonomy_gate.sh |
| `state/sweep-latest.md` | Markdown | Last sweep report | /sweep | /status, session_context |
| `knowledge/experiment-learnings.md` | Markdown | Causal model (Known/Uncertain/Unknown/Dead) | /build, /experiment, /meta | All agents |
| `knowledge/predictions.tsv` | TSV (7 cols) | Prediction tracking | All agents | /meta, check_predictions |
| `knowledge/patterns.tsv` | TSV | Hot files, tool bigrams (graduated 3+ sessions) | extract_patterns | /strategy, /build |
| `knowledge/landscape.json` | JSON | Scout market positions | /scout | /strategy, /design, taste.mjs |
| `knowledge/portfolio.json` | JSON | BUY/HOLD/SELL per project | /strategy | session_context |
| `knowledge/taste.jsonl` | JSONL | Founder taste preferences | /scout | taste.mjs |
| `knowledge/sessions/{project}.md` | Markdown | Per-project session captures | capture_knowledge | session_context |
| `knowledge/meta/grades.jsonl` | JSONL | Agent grades per meta cycle | /meta | /meta |
| `logs/usage.jsonl` | JSONL | Every tool call | track_usage | extract_patterns, track_cost |
| `logs/cost-history.tsv` | TSV | Per-session cost | track_cost | /status |
| `logs/artifact-failures.jsonl` | JSONL | Agents that produced nothing | verify_artifacts | /meta |
| `logs/thinking-health.tsv` | TSV | Prediction rate, accuracy | check_predictions | /meta |

### Per-Project State (`.claude/`)

| Path | Format | Purpose | Written By | Read By |
|------|--------|---------|-----------|---------|
| `plans/active-plan.md` | Markdown | Current sprint contract | /strategy | /build, /todofocus, /go |
| `plans/product-model.md` | Markdown | Creation loop map | /strategy | All agents |
| `plans/learning-agenda.md` | Markdown | Day-1 experiment curriculum | /setup | session_context |
| `experiments/*.tsv` | TSV (6 cols) | commit, score, delta, status, description, learning | /build, /experiment | /strategy, /eval |
| `evals/reports/*.md` | Markdown | Eval reports | /eval, /product-eval | /strategy |
| `evals/reports/history.jsonl` | JSONL | All eval results + gaps | /eval | /strategy (feed-forward) |
| `evals/taste-history.tsv` | TSV | Taste score trends | taste.mjs | session_context, /taste |
| `scores/history.tsv` | TSV (4 cols) | Score trends per commit | score.sh | /score, session_context |
| `cache/score-cache.json` | JSON | Latest score (TTL 300s) | score.sh | /build, session_context |
| `cache/taste-cache.json` | JSON | Latest taste (TTL 2h) | taste.mjs | /design |
| `features.yml` | YAML | Feature→routes mapping | /setup | /taste --feature |
| `state/go-state.json` | JSON | /go loop progress | /go | /go |

---

## Data Schemas

### Brain File

```json
{
  "agent": "builder",
  "version": 2,
  "identity": {
    "natural_tensions": ["vs design-engineer — velocity vs quality"],
    "bias_awareness": "You overestimate single-change impact."
  },
  "next_move": {
    "action": "What should happen next",
    "priority": "high"
  },
  "memory": {
    "lessons": ["lesson1", "lesson2"],
    "last_run_summary": "What happened last execution"
  },
  "last_run": "2026-03-09T23:00:00Z",
  "updated": "2026-03-09T23:00:00Z"
}
```

### Workspace Registry

```json
{
  "projects": {
    "project-name": {
      "path": "/absolute/path",
      "stage": "mvp|early|growth|mature",
      "autonomy": "manual|guided|autonomous",
      "experimentation": "conservative|balanced|aggressive",
      "features": ["feature1"],
      "last_score": 70,
      "last_taste": null,
      "active": true
    }
  },
  "focus": "project-name",
  "updated": "2026-03-11T12:00:00Z"
}
```

### Experiment TSV (6 columns)

```
commit	score	delta	status	description	learning
abc1234	72	+5	keep	Added ghost pill CTAs	Empty states need contextual guidance
def5678	68	-4	discard	Removed sidebar nav	Users need persistent navigation
```

### Score Cache

```json
{
  "score": 70,
  "build": 100,
  "build_gate": "PASS",
  "structure": 70,
  "hygiene": 70,
  "taste": null,
  "project_type": "cli",
  "src_dir": "bin",
  "integrity_warnings": ["PLATEAU: structure unchanged across last 5 runs"],
  "cached_at": "2026-03-11T12:00:00Z"
}
```

### Predictions TSV (7 columns)

```
date	agent	prediction	evidence	result	correct	model_update
2026-03-11	builder	copy changes boost distinctiveness	3 kept experiments	pending	-	-
```

---

## Agent Communication

Agents communicate exclusively through the filesystem. No direct agent-to-agent messaging.

### Data Flow

```
scout → landscape.json → strategist → active-plan.md → builder → score/history.tsv
                                    ↘                  ↗
                              experiment-learnings.md
                                    ↗
meta → reads all brains + grades → fixes agent prompts/tests
                                    ↘
sweep → reads workspace + scores → sweep-latest.md → session_context
```

### Per-Agent I/O

| Agent | Reads | Writes |
|-------|-------|--------|
| **strategist** | landscape.json, experiment-learnings, eval history, all brains | active-plan.md, product-model.md, strategist brain |
| **builder** | active-plan.md, experiment-learnings, workspace | Git commits, experiment TSV, score cache, builder brain |
| **design-engineer** | CLAUDE.md, score history, taste cache | Git commits (taste fixes), design-engineer brain |
| **sweep** | workspace.json, score-cache, taste reports, git log | sweep-latest.md, sweep brain |
| **scout** | rhino.yml, landscape-2026.md, git history | landscape.json, taste.jsonl, scout brain |
| **meta** | All brains, test output, grades.jsonl, artifact-failures | Grades, system fixes, meta brain |

---

## Scoring Pipeline

### Two-Tier Model (training loss + eval loss)

**score.sh** = training loss. Cheap grep-based, <5s, every commit.

```
Input: project directory
  ↓
Detect project type (nextjs/react/vue/svelte/node/cli)
  ↓
┌────────────────┐
│ BUILD (gate)   │ TypeScript errors, stale builds, npm build
│ threshold: 70  │ FAIL → entire score = 0
└───────┬────────┘
        ↓
┌────────────────┐
│ STRUCTURE      │ Dead ends (no links), empty states (no CTAs)
│ 0-100          │ Weighted: dead_end/2, empty_state/3
└───────┬────────┘
        ↓
┌────────────────┐
│ HYGIENE        │ :any, console.log, TODOs, large imports, lint overrides
│ 0-100          │ Tiered penalties (thresholds in code)
└───────┬────────┘
        ↓
Integrity checks (6 detectors)
  ↓
Cache result (TTL 300s) → .claude/cache/score-cache.json
Append history → .claude/scores/history.tsv
```

**taste.mjs** = eval loss. Vision-based, 2-3min, on demand.

```
Input: project directory (+ optional --feature)
  ↓
Detect routes (Next.js app/, React Router, etc.)
  ↓
Priority selection (max 8 routes: create, home, dashboard first)
  ↓
Start/detect dev server
  ↓
Playwright screenshots: desktop (1440x900) + mobile (390x844)
  ↓
Load context: landscape.json, taste.jsonl, CLAUDE.md
  ↓
Claude vision eval with 11-dimension rubric
  ↓
Score 1-5 per dimension + GATE checks (layout_coherence, IA)
  ↓
Output: weakest_dimension, one_thing fix, would_return, would_recommend
  ↓
Cache (TTL 2h) → .claude/cache/taste-cache.json
Append → .claude/evals/taste-history.tsv
```

### Weakest Link Calculation

```
weakest = min(STRUCTURE, HYGIENE)
if BUILD_GATE == FAIL: weakest = 0
if TASTE exists: weakest = min(weakest, TASTE_SCORE)
```

---

## Integrity System (3 layers)

### Layer 1: Instructions
- score-integrity.md: "Scores are diagnostic, not goals"
- build.md anti-sycophancy: "'Get to X' is never valid"
- taste.mjs rubric: "If unsure between 2 and 3, pick 2"

### Layer 2: Enforcement (10 runtime detectors)
**score.sh (6)**: COSMETIC-ONLY, INFLATION (>15 jump), PLATEAU (5 flat), STAGE_CEILING, KEEP_RATE_HIGH, NO_MOONSHOTS

**taste.mjs (4)**: GENEROUS (avg >3.5 pre-mature), NO_WEAKNESS (no dim <4), FLAT_EVAL (all same), JUMP (>1.5 between evals)

### Layer 3: Verification
- tests/run.sh checks that enforcement exists
- Canary tests with known inputs → known outputs
- Meta lens B: "Would these tests catch the problems the founder actually has?"

### Stage Ceilings

| Stage | Score Range | Taste Range |
|-------|------------|-------------|
| mvp | 30-65 | 1.5-3.0 |
| early | 45-80 | 2.0-3.5 |
| growth | 60-90 | 3.0-4.0 |
| mature | 70-95 | 3.5-4.5 |

---

## Hook Architecture

Hooks are shell scripts that fire on Claude Code lifecycle events via `config/settings.json`.

```
PreToolUse (before execution, can block)
  ├── session_context.sh  → inject state (30min cooldown)
  ├── autonomy_gate.sh    → check autonomy level
  └── enforce_ideation.sh → block writes during ideation

PostToolUse (after execution, observe only)
  ├── track_usage.sh      → log to usage.jsonl
  ├── post_edit_quality.sh → typecheck + lint warnings
  └── thinking_nudge.sh   → prediction enforcement

Stop (session end, cleanup)
  ├── capture_knowledge.sh → session artifacts
  ├── track_cost.sh        → cost summary
  ├── extract_patterns.sh  → pattern graduation
  └── check_predictions.sh → thinking health
```

All hooks are idempotent, fast (<200ms), macOS-compatible (no gawk, no GNU date).

---

## Config System

### rhino.yml (single source of truth)

Read by `bin/lib/config.sh` via `cfg()` function (dotted-key YAML reader).

**Sections**: agents (budgets, schedules), scoring (penalties, thresholds), taste (routes, viewports, timeouts, dimensions), knowledge (retention, decay), context (injection limits), integrity (ceilings, delta caps), experiments (rates, floors, moonshot frequency), docs (budgets, triggers), go (iterations, plateau), hooks (toggles), thinking (prediction targets).

### settings.json (Claude Code hooks)

Maps hook scripts to lifecycle events with matchers. Merged into `~/.claude/settings.json` during install.

---

## Install Flow

```
./install.sh
  ↓
Create ~/.claude/ directory tree (state, knowledge, logs, programs, agents, commands, plans)
  ↓
Symlink programs/*.md → ~/.claude/programs/
Symlink agents/refs/*.md → ~/.claude/agents/refs/
Symlink skills/*/SKILL.md → ~/.claude/commands/*/SKILL.md
Symlink hooks/*.sh → ~/.claude/hooks/ (chmod +x)
Symlink bin/{score.sh,taste.mjs} → ~/bin/
Symlink bin/rhino → ~/bin/rhino
  ↓
Merge config/settings.json → ~/.claude/settings.json (jq merge)
  ↓
Add RHINO_DIR to shell profile
```

Idempotent. Safe to re-run. `--check` for dry-run.

---

## Directory Structure

```
rhino-os/
├── bin/
│   ├── rhino              # CLI entry (494 lines, measurement only)
│   ├── score.sh           # Structural scoring
│   ├── taste.mjs          # Visual taste eval (Playwright + Claude vision)
│   ├── gen-dashboard.sh   # Legacy
│   └── lib/
│       ├── config.sh      # rhino.yml reader (cfg function)
│       ├── brains.sh      # Brain JSON management
│       ├── workspace.sh   # Multi-project registry
│       └── docs.sh        # Context doc generation
├── skills/                # 19 skills → symlinked to ~/.claude/commands/
├── programs/              # 3 reasoning frameworks (strategy, build, meta)
├── agents/refs/           # 8 reference documents (thinking, integrity, etc.)
├── hooks/                 # 10 lifecycle hooks → symlinked to ~/.claude/hooks/
├── config/
│   ├── rhino.yml          # All tunables
│   ├── settings.json      # Claude Code hook config
│   └── CLAUDE.md          # Project template
├── tests/run.sh           # Self-eval (5 tiers, 251 tests)
├── install.sh             # One-command setup
└── documents/             # Generated context docs (this file)
```
